basic_details.job_title: DHS Kanchipuram Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 28 Office Assistant, Radiographer and More Posts
basic_details.short_information: District Health Society Kanchipuram (DHS Kanchipuram) has released an official notification for the recruitment of 28 Various Posts. Interested and eligible candidates can apply Offline by sending the application form to the official address. The last date to submit the application is 23-07-2026.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: Higher Secondary with Science, Bachelor Degree in Occupational Therapy, Diploma in Hospital Sterilisation Technology, Masters Degree in Medical Psychology, 10th Std with MPHW and Nursing Assistant Training, 8th Pass with Tamil, Read and Write Tamil, MSc in Food Service Management and Dietetics with 2 years experience, Diploma in Radio Diagnosis Technician
qualification.details: Theatre Tech: A Pass in Higher Secondary Course with the science subjects of Physics, Chemistry, Botany and Zoology or Physics, Chemistry and Biology, and One year certificate course in Theatre Technician conducted by the Government Medical Institutions under the control of the Director of Medical Education or in any other institutions recognized by the State or Central Government. Occupational Therapist: Must have passed Higher Secondary Course, and a Bachelor Degree in Occupational Therapy 3years course with 6 months internship until 1997 (or) Four years course with 6 months internship in Occupational Therapy awarded by any University recognized by the University Grants Commission. Sterilization Operator (CSSD Tech. Assistant): Diploma in Hospital Sterilisation Technology in a NMC recognised Medical Colleges. Blood Bank Counsellor: Masters Degree in Medical Psychology from a recognized University; Candidates must pass the 10th Std and completed MPHW course 1 year in recognised institutions; Should have undergone Nursing Assistant Training in any Institutions recognised by the Government. Female/Male Nursing Assistant: Candidates must pass the 10th Std and completed MPHW course 1 year in recognised institutions; Should have undergone Nursing Assistant Training in any Institutions recognised by the Government. Office Assistant: Completed 8th pass with Tamil read and write. Dhobi: Should know read and write Tamil. Dietician: Must possess MSc degree in Food Service Management and Dietetics or Foods and nutrition or Food Science and Nutrition or Home Science with Nutrition and Dietetics as major or Home Science Emerging Technology, Food Service Management and Dietetics from any recognised University approved by the University Grants Commission; Previous practical experience for a period not less than 2 years in Multi-Speciality Hospital (minimum 100 bed strength) under the supervision of qualified, experienced senior dietician. Radiographer: Dip.in Radio Diagnosis Technician in Government Recognised Institution.

salary_details.details: Theatre Tech: ₹15000/- Per Month Occupational Therapist: ₹15000/- Per Month Sterilization Operator (CSSD Tech. Assistant): ₹15000/- Per Month Blood Bank Counsellor: ₹15000/- Per Month Female/Male Nursing Assistant: ₹12000/- Per Month Office Assistant: ₹12000/- Per Month Dhobi: ₹12000/- Per Month Dietician: ₹15000/- Per Month Radiographer: ₹15000/- Per Month

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for DHS Kanchipuram Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://kanchipuram.nic.in/.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 23-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: DHS Kanchipuram Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the DHS Kanchipuram Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download DHS Kanchipuram Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: DHS Kanchipuram Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Theatre Tech: A Pass in Higher Secondary Course with the science subjects of Physics, Chemistry, Botany and Zoology or Physics, Chemistry and Biology, and One year certificate course in Theatre Technician conducted by the Government Medical Institutions under the control of the Director of Medical Education or in any other institutions recognized by the State or Central Government. Occupational Therapist: Must have passed Higher Secondary Course, and a Bachelor Degree in Occupational Therapy 3years course with 6 months internship until 1997 (or) Four years course with 6 months internship in Occupational Therapy awarded by any University recognized by the University Grants Commission. Sterilization Operator (CSSD Tech. Assistant): Diploma in Hospital Sterilisation Technology in a NMC recognised Medical Colleges. Blood Bank Counsellor: Masters Degree in Medical Psychology from a recognized University; Candidates must pass the 10th Std and completed MPHW course 1 year in recognised institutions; Should have undergone Nursing Assistant Training in any Institutions recognised by the Government. Female/Male Nursing Assistant: Candidates must pass the 10th Std and completed MPHW course 1 year in recognised institutions; Should have undergone Nursing Assistant Training in any Institutions recognised by the Government. Office Assistant: Completed 8th pass with Tamil read and write. Dhobi: Should know read and write Tamil. Dietician: Must possess MSc degree in Food Service Management and Dietetics or Foods and nutrition or Food Science and Nutrition or Home Science with Nutrition and Dietetics as major or Home Science Emerging Technology, Food Service Management and Dietetics from any recognised University approved by the University Grants Commission; Previous practical experience for a period not less than 2 years in Multi-Speciality Hospital (minimum 100 bed strength) under the supervision of qualified, experienced senior dietician. Radiographer: Dip.in Radio Diagnosis Technician in Government Recognised Institution.

rows.event: Last Date for Receipt of Application

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for DHS Kanchipuram Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: https://kanchipuram.nic.in/. Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 23-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for DHS Kanchipuram Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the DHS Kanchipuram Various Posts Recruitment 2026 is 23rd July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in DHS Kanchipuram Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are a total of 28 vacancies announced for various posts in the District Health Society Kanchipuram.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for DHS Kanchipuram Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is offline. Candidates need to send their applications to the official address.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary range for the posts in DHS Kanchipuram Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The salary for the posts ranges from Rs. 12,000 to Rs. 15,000 per month, depending on the specific post.

faq.question: Q5. What are the minimum qualifications required for the posts?
faq.answer: The qualifications vary by post, ranging from 8th pass with Tamil knowledge to Master's degrees in relevant fields and specific diplomas or certificate courses.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for DHS Kanchipuram Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process for the DHS Kanchipuram Various Posts Recruitment 2026 will be based on an interview.

faq.question: Q8. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the official website of Kanchipuram District, which is https://kanchipuram.nic.in/.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for the recruited candidates?
faq.answer: The posts are contractual in nature, meaning the employment is for a fixed period as per the terms of the contract.

faq.question: Q10. Which district is this recruitment for?
faq.answer: This recruitment is for the District Health Society Kanchipuram, located in Tamil Nadu.
